title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.836 - Kaitlyn Anderson memorial bridge designated for a bridge on Telegraph Road in St. Louis County
text:
227.836.  Kaitlyn Anderson memorial bridge designated for a bridge on Telegraph Road in St. Louis County. — The bridge on Telegraph Road passing over Interstate 255 in St. Louis County shall be designated the "Kaitlyn Anderson Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2023 S.B. 127)
